Patrick Pentz.bio: Tall Austrian goalkeeper who moved to Danish football with Brondby after developing in the Austrian league. Earned his place as a reliable option in the national team setup.
Patrick Pentz.playingStyle: Commanding goalkeeper with good reflexes and confident handling from crosses
Patrick Pentz.worldCup2026Role: Starting goalkeeper or strong backup option providing stability between the posts
Patrick Pentz.notableFact: Was part of Austria's squad at Euro 2024 in Germany, gaining valuable tournament experience

Stefan Posch.bio: Versatile Austrian defender who has established himself in Serie A with Bologna. Capable of playing center-back and right-back with equal effectiveness.
Stefan Posch.playingStyle: Athletic, ball-playing defender comfortable in a high defensive line with strong tackling
Stefan Posch.worldCup2026Role: Starting defender who can slot in at center-back or right-back depending on tactical needs
Stefan Posch.notableFact: Played a key role in Bologna's remarkable Serie A campaign that secured Champions League qualification

Maximilian Wöber.bio: Left-footed center-back who has played for Ajax, Red Bull Salzburg, and Leeds United before settling at Werder Bremen. Brings composure and quality on the ball from defense.
Maximilian Wöber.playingStyle: Left-footed center-back who excels in build-up play and progressive passing from deep
Maximilian Wöber.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back option who brings balance to the defense with his left foot
Maximilian Wöber.notableFact: Played in the Champions League with Ajax and has experience across four of Europe's top leagues

Kevin Danso.bio: Powerful center-back who has risen to become one of the most sought-after defenders in European football. His move to Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League cemented his status as a top defender.
Kevin Danso.playingStyle: Physically dominant center-back who wins aerial duels and makes crucial interventions
Kevin Danso.worldCup2026Role: First-choice center-back and defensive rock at the heart of Austria's backline
Kevin Danso.notableFact: His transfer to Tottenham made him one of the most expensive Austrian defenders in history

Philipp Lienhart.bio: Dependable center-back who came through Real Madrid's youth academy before building a successful career at Freiburg in the Bundesliga. Known for his intelligence and calm demeanor.
Philipp Lienhart.playingStyle: Intelligent, composed center-back who reads the game superbly and distributes cleanly
Philipp Lienhart.worldCup2026Role: Reliable center-back rotation option who provides defensive depth and quality
Philipp Lienhart.notableFact: Spent time in Real Madrid's academy as a youth player before finding regular football in Germany with Freiburg

Nicolas Seiwald.bio: Young Austrian defensive midfielder who has quickly established himself as one of the best in his position in the Bundesliga at RB Leipzig. A product of the Red Bull Salzburg system.
Nicolas Seiwald.playingStyle: Disciplined holding midfielder who screens the defense, wins second balls, and recycles possession efficiently
Nicolas Seiwald.worldCup2026Role: Starting defensive midfielder who anchors the midfield and protects the backline
Nicolas Seiwald.notableFact: Graduated from the Red Bull Salzburg academy that has produced numerous top-level Austrian internationals

Marko Arnautović.bio: Charismatic and experienced Austrian striker who has played at the highest level across Europe, including at Inter Milan, West Ham, and Stoke City. Austria's talisman for over a decade.
Marko Arnautović.playingStyle: Powerful, technical forward who can hold up play, run at defenders, and finish with either foot
Marko Arnautović.worldCup2026Role: Veteran squad leader and impact striker who brings experience and personality to the team
Marko Arnautović.notableFact: Austria's record appearance maker with over 115 caps, he is the most capped Austrian player in modern history

David Alaba.bio: Generational Austrian talent and one of the finest defenders of his era. Has won multiple Champions League titles with Bayern Munich and Real Madrid. A natural leader and world-class performer.
David Alaba.playingStyle: Elegant, left-footed defender who can play center-back, left-back, or midfield with equal brilliance
David Alaba.worldCup2026Role: Captain and defensive leader whose presence elevates the entire team, fitness permitting after ACL recovery
David Alaba.notableFact: Has won the Champions League with both Bayern Munich and Real Madrid, one of very few players to achieve this distinction

Michael Gregoritsch.bio: Tall, left-footed striker who has been a consistent scorer in the Bundesliga with Freiburg. His ability to contribute in buildup play makes him more than just a target man.
Michael Gregoritsch.playingStyle: Tall striker who combines aerial threat with intelligent movement and link-up play
Michael Gregoritsch.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker or key rotation option who provides a physical presence in attack
Michael Gregoritsch.notableFact: Scored Austria's dramatic late equalizer against France at Euro 2024, one of the goals of the tournament

Florian Grillitsch.bio: Deep-lying midfielder who has spent most of his career in the Bundesliga. Known for his passing range and ability to control the tempo from a central midfield position.
Florian Grillitsch.playingStyle: Cerebral midfielder who dictates play with his passing range and positional intelligence
Florian Grillitsch.worldCup2026Role: Midfield option who can step in to control possession and provide an alternative tactical approach
Florian Grillitsch.notableFact: Has been a consistent performer at Hoffenheim across multiple Bundesliga seasons

Christoph Baumgartner.bio: Dynamic attacking midfielder who has thrived at RB Leipzig after impressing at Hoffenheim. A key creative figure for Austria with an eye for goal from midfield.
Christoph Baumgartner.playingStyle: Energetic attacking midfielder who makes well-timed runs into the box and finishes clinically
Christoph Baumgartner.worldCup2026Role: Starting attacking midfielder and one of Austria's most important creative forces
Christoph Baumgartner.notableFact: Scored the winning goal against Ukraine at Euro 2020, one of the most important goals in Austrian football history

Heinz Lindner.bio: Experienced Austrian goalkeeper who has played across several European leagues including in Belgium. Provides reliable backup and veteran presence in the goalkeeping group.
Heinz Lindner.playingStyle: Experienced shot-stopper with good communication and organizational skills
Heinz Lindner.worldCup2026Role: Veteran backup goalkeeper providing depth and experience in the squad
Heinz Lindner.notableFact: Has represented Austria across multiple age groups and tournaments throughout his long international career

Philipp Mwene.bio: Dependable left-back who has been a steady presence at Mainz in the Bundesliga. Born in Austria to Congolese parents, he brings consistency and defensive reliability.
Philipp Mwene.playingStyle: Solid defensive left-back who focuses on stopping opposition wingers and providing reliable overlaps
Philipp Mwene.worldCup2026Role: Backup left-back providing solid defensive cover on the flank
Philipp Mwene.notableFact: Born in Vienna to Congolese parents, he has been a loyal member of Austria's squad through qualification

Patrick Wimmer.bio: Exciting young Austrian winger who has shown his ability to beat defenders and create chances at Wolfsburg in the Bundesliga. An energetic and direct wide player.
Patrick Wimmer.playingStyle: Direct, pacy winger who drives at defenders and delivers dangerous crosses
Patrick Wimmer.worldCup2026Role: Wide attacking option who can stretch defenses with his pace and directness
Patrick Wimmer.notableFact: Earned his Bundesliga move through standout performances in the Austrian league with Arminia Bielefeld

Marcel Sabitzer.bio: Versatile and experienced Austrian midfielder who has played at the highest level with RB Leipzig, Bayern Munich, and Borussia Dortmund. One of Austria's most decorated active players.
Marcel Sabitzer.playingStyle: Box-to-box midfielder with an exceptional engine, long-range shooting, and tactical awareness
Marcel Sabitzer.worldCup2026Role: Starting central midfielder and heartbeat of the team, driving play with energy and quality
Marcel Sabitzer.notableFact: Reached the Champions League semi-finals with RB Leipzig and won the league title with Bayern Munich

Alexander Prass.bio: Young, athletic left-back who earned a move to Sporting CP in Portugal after impressive performances in Austria. Represents the next generation of Austrian full-backs.
Alexander Prass.playingStyle: Athletic, modern full-back who combines defensive work with progressive carries and overlapping runs
Alexander Prass.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back or key rotation option, bringing youthful energy to the defense
Alexander Prass.notableFact: Impressed at Euro 2024 as one of the younger members of the Austrian squad, earning his move to Sporting CP

Andreas Weimann.bio: Experienced Austrian forward who has spent his entire club career in English football, from Aston Villa to Bristol City and now Blackburn Rovers. A reliable and hard-working attacker.
Andreas Weimann.playingStyle: Industrious wide forward who works tirelessly, presses high, and makes intelligent runs
Andreas Weimann.worldCup2026Role: Experienced squad player who brings energy and work rate as a substitute option
Andreas Weimann.notableFact: Has played over 400 matches in English football across the Premier League and Championship

Romano Schmid.bio: Creative Austrian midfielder who has developed well at Werder Bremen in the Bundesliga. Known for his technical skill and ability to find pockets of space between the lines.
Romano Schmid.playingStyle: Creative number 10 who finds space between the lines and plays incisive final passes
Romano Schmid.worldCup2026Role: Attacking midfield option providing creativity and technical quality off the bench
Romano Schmid.notableFact: Originally from the Red Bull Salzburg academy before establishing himself in the Bundesliga with Bremen

Konrad Laimer.bio: Tireless Austrian midfielder who has won the Bundesliga with Bayern Munich. Known for his incredible work rate and pressing intensity, he is one of the hardest workers in European football.
Konrad Laimer.playingStyle: High-energy pressing machine who wins the ball back relentlessly and drives forward with purpose
Konrad Laimer.worldCup2026Role: Key starter in midfield whose pressing and energy set the tone for Austria's high-intensity system
Konrad Laimer.notableFact: Joined Bayern Munich from RB Leipzig and immediately became a first-team regular due to his exceptional work ethic

Alexander Schlager.bio: Austrian goalkeeper who has been a loyal servant for LASK in the Austrian Bundesliga. Provides reliable third-choice goalkeeping depth to the national squad.
Alexander Schlager.playingStyle: Solid, dependable goalkeeper with good reflexes and steady handling
Alexander Schlager.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper providing domestic league experience and squad depth
Alexander Schlager.notableFact: Has been a standout performer in the Austrian Bundesliga and has represented LASK in European competition

Stefan Lainer.bio: Experienced right-back who has been a fixture of the Austrian national team for years. Played in the Bundesliga with Borussia Monchengladbach before returning to Red Bull Salzburg.
Stefan Lainer.playingStyle: Energetic right-back who bombs forward, delivers crosses, and tracks back diligently
Stefan Lainer.worldCup2026Role: Experienced right-back option providing depth and reliability on the right flank
Stefan Lainer.notableFact: Was a key player in Austria's qualification campaign for Euro 2020, their first major tournament in decades

Valentino Lazaro.bio: Austrian-born player of Congolese descent who has played for Inter Milan, Newcastle United, and now Torino. A versatile wing-back with excellent athleticism.
Valentino Lazaro.playingStyle: Athletic wing-back who combines pace with skill and can play on either flank
Valentino Lazaro.worldCup2026Role: Versatile defensive option who can cover multiple positions across the back line
Valentino Lazaro.notableFact: Made his Serie A debut with Inter Milan after impressing at Hertha Berlin in the Bundesliga

Xaver Schlager.bio: Dynamic Austrian midfielder who has established himself as one of the best box-to-box players in the Bundesliga at RB Leipzig. A complete midfielder with a well-rounded skill set.
Xaver Schlager.playingStyle: Complete box-to-box midfielder who contributes in all phases with energy, skill, and tactical awareness
Xaver Schlager.worldCup2026Role: Starting central midfielder who links defense and attack with his all-round quality
Xaver Schlager.notableFact: Has recovered from a serious ACL injury to reclaim his place as a starter at both club and international level

Matthias Seidl.bio: Young Austrian midfielder making his mark at Rapid Wien in the domestic league. Represents the exciting next wave of Austrian midfield talent.
Matthias Seidl.playingStyle: Creative, technically gifted young midfielder with good vision and passing ability
Matthias Seidl.worldCup2026Role: Young squad member gaining experience, available as a creative option from the bench
Matthias Seidl.notableFact: One of the standout young talents in the Austrian Bundesliga, earning international recognition at a young age

Junior Adamu.bio: Nigerian-born Austrian striker who came through the Red Bull Salzburg system before moving to Freiburg. Brings explosive pace and energy to the attack.
Junior Adamu.playingStyle: Rapid, powerful striker who stretches defenses with his pace and direct running
Junior Adamu.worldCup2026Role: Impact substitute who can cause problems for tiring defenders with his speed and power
Junior Adamu.notableFact: Born in Nigeria and raised in Austria, he came through the famed Red Bull Salzburg development pathway

Maximilian Entrup.bio: Late-blooming Austrian striker who has worked his way up from the lower tiers of Austrian football to earn an international call-up through consistent goalscoring at TSV Hartberg.
Maximilian Entrup.playingStyle: Traditional number 9 with good movement in the box and a sharp eye for goal
Maximilian Entrup.worldCup2026Role: Squad depth striker who earned his place through domestic league goalscoring form
Maximilian Entrup.notableFact: His rise from the Austrian lower divisions to the national team is one of the most inspiring stories in recent Austrian football
